decontamination_notes: Real fix from python/mypy PR #21544, merged 2026-05-28, after model training cutoffs. Multiple independent TypeVarTuple-with-defaults bugs spanning semanal.py and typeanal.py in one of the deepest corners of the type system; graded on three independent parity points (concrete default substitution, empty-tuple default, defaulted-TypeVar-after-TVT error) so partial fixes fail. Repo sliced at base commit (mypy/ incl. typeshed subtree); MIT LICENSE preserved. Runs in per-task image vulcanbench/sandbox:mypy-21544 (typing_extensions, mypy_extensions, pathspec, librt); the workspace mypy runs interpreted via PYTHONPATH=. as a subprocess on test snippets.
